results.title: Looking for your phone after waking up? Sadhguru suggests a different morning habitMornings and phones
results.description: Sadhguru, the spiritual guide, recommends a phone-free start to the day, promoting the idea of smiling as a true source of joy. He believes that authentic happiness arises from our inner selves, rather than being dependent on external circumstances or others. A simple smile, taking just seconds, can transform one’s outlook and create a positive energy that resonates throughout the whole day.

results.title: Instagram finally lets you give carousel images individual captions
results.description: Meta has announced a new option for Instagram which users have been practically begging for – the ability to use multiple captions on a carousel. As things stand at the moment, when you upload several images to Instagram to create a carousel, they must all share a single caption. While this can sometimes make sense, it is not always the case – and this is why the change is being seen as so important. The good news is that a simple toggle is all it takes to switch between a single caption for multiple images, or individual captions. This helps... [Continue Reading]
